info.title: Fathom
info.description: Macroeconomic data API powered by FRED (Federal Reserve Economic Data). 816,000+ time series covering GDP, inflation, employment, interest rates, money supply, and more.
info.x-guidance: Use /api/popular to discover available indicators. Use /api/search to find specific series by keyword. Use /api/observations to fetch data values. Use /api/snapshot for a dashboard overview. Use /api/compare to compare multiple series. Series IDs are uppercase codes like GDP, UNRATE, CPIAUCSL, FEDFUNDS, DGS10.

post.description: Fetch data values for any FRED economic series. Use series IDs like GDP, UNRATE, CPIAUCSL, FEDFUNDS, DGS10.

seriesId.description: FRED series ID (e.g. GDP, UNRATE, CPIAUCSL)

sort.description: Sort order: asc or desc (default: desc)

units.description: Units transformation (lin, chg, ch1, pch, pca, cch, cca, log)

frequency.description: Frequency (d, w, bw, m, q, sa, a)

post.description: Search across 816,000+ FRED economic time series by keyword.
Get detailed metadata for a specific FRED series: title, units, frequency, date range, popularity.
Browse FRED data categories: National Accounts, Prices, Employment, Money & Banking, etc.
20 most-watched macroeconomic indicators with FRED series IDs, names, and units.
Upcoming Federal Reserve economic data releases.
List economic data series within a specific FRED category, sorted by popularity.
Browse all FRED tags. Tags describe data attributes like 'monthly', 'gdp', 'inflation', 'nsa'.
Find economic data series matching a specific tag (e.g. 'gdp', 'monthly', 'inflation').

tag.description: Tag name (e.g. gdp, monthly, inflation, nsa)

post.description: List all economic data series within a specific FRED data release.
Get specific release dates for a FRED data release.
Fetch observations for multiple FRED series in one call. Returns latest values for each.
Compare 2-5 economic series side by side with latest values and recent trends.

seriesIds.description: Array of 2-5 FRED series IDs to compare

post.description: Get the most recent observation value for a FRED series.
Upcoming economic data release calendar with dates and release names.
Dashboard snapshot of key US economic indicators: GDP, unemployment, CPI, Fed Funds rate, 10Y Treasury, S&P 500.
List all FRED data sources (Federal Reserve, BLS, Census, BEA, etc.).
Get all tags associated with a FRED data category.
Get all tags associated with a specific FRED series.
Search FRED tags by keyword.
Get vintage/revision dates for a FRED series. Shows when data was revised.
Get categories related to a specific FRED economic data series.
Get child categories for a parent FRED category. Walk the category tree.
